## Step Into The Exclusive FIFA World Cup™ Experience
With FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card 
### Official FIFA World Cup 2026™ Merchandise Drops – Courtesy of Visa
  * 1500+ Merchandise - National Team Jerseys, Matchballs at an Exclusive PIXEL Insider price of ₹1
  * Drops go live on 4th and 11th June at 6 PM on [pixeldrops.razorpay.com(opens in a new tab)](https://pixeldrops.razorpay.com/)   
Stay tuned.​


[T&C Apply​(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/fifa-pixel-credit-card/pdf/visa-merch-drops-tnc-pixel-credit-card-4th-june.pdf)[(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/fifa-pixel-credit-card/pdf/terms-and-conditions-for-hdfc-bank-pixel-play-fifa-world-cup-visa-credit-card.pdf)
![FIFA Merchandise](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Limited Edition FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card
  * For the FIFA World Cup 2026™, HDFC Bank and VISA dropped the exclusive FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card. Built for the fans
  * Launched in Mumbai with full stadium energy—featuring football icon Michael Owen and GenZ star Ahaan Panday
  * _New customers can[apply here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=ZETA&LGCode=MKTG)_


![Agri Banking](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Masterclass & Meet-and-Greet with Michael Owen
  * PIXEL unlocked a masterclass moment—select PIXEL Play customers met football legend Michael Owen, up close 
  * From meet-and-greet to match play—learning real moves on-field from the Ballon d’Or winner himself


![Agri Banking](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Luxury Staycations & Gaming Consoles up for grabs 
  * Top spenders during the campaign period get a chance to win big
  * **10 Luxury Staycations Up for Grabs!​**  
2N/3D couple staycation at 5-star properties across India- perfect for catching the quarter finals in style
  * **20 Gaming Consoles to Win!**  
Don’t just watch the game. Play it.​
  * Get ready to win BIG
**
  * Validity Period : 15 th May to 15th June 2026​
**

## Open an FD to get your assured PIXEL
[Apply Now ](https://pixel.hdfcbank.com/pixel-onboard/landing/?flow=FdLien "Apply Now")
![Pixel Play Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/620-363-pink?fmt=webp-alpha)
## Card Benefits & Features
### CashBack Benefits
5% CashBack on choice of any two following packs:
  * Dining & Entertainment Category - BookMyShow & Zomato
  * Travel Category – MakeMyTrip & Uber
  * Grocery Category – Blinkit & Reliance Smart Bazaar
  * Electronics Category – Croma & Reliance Digital
  * Fashion Category – Nykaa & Myntra
  * 3% CashBack on Amazon, Flipkart or PayZapp
  * 1% CashBack on UPI Spends (Applicable only on PIXEL RuPay Credit Card holders). Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card/pixel-rupay-credit-card-faqs.pdf) to know more.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card/pixel-play-credit-card-terms-and-conditions.pdf) for more T&Cs


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card "View More")
![Pixel Play Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Build Your Own Card
  * Choose Billing Date.
  * Choose Merchant Partners.
  * Choose card colour.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card "View More")
![Cashback Benefits](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Enjoy hassle-free, one-click instant conversion of the PIXEL Play Credit Card outstanding balance* to EMIs from your PayZapp. 
  * Digitally manage your PIXEL Play Credit Card from PayZapp. Access features such as Card Controls, Rewards, EMI Dashboard, Statements, Repayments, Recent Transactions, Disputes, Hotlisting, Help Center, Notifications, etc.
  * Get a joining fee waiver by spending ₹20,000 within 90 days of issuance
  * Access Revolving Credit at a nominal interest rate on your PIXEL Play Credit Card.
  * Get up to 50 days of interest free period on your PIXEL Play Credit Card from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant).


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card "View More")
![Pixel Play Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** Minimum: 21 years, Maximum: 60 years
  * **Income** (Monthly) - ₹25,000


Self-Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** Minimum: 21 years, Maximum: 65 years
  * **Annual ITR** > ₹6,00,000


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Interested in an FD Backed PIXEL Credit Card?
  * **Now apply for the PIXEL Credit Card backed by an FD  
**(No credit score or income proof needed!)
  * **Why choose an FD-backed Credit Card?**
    * Get up to 90% of your FD value as Credit Limit
    * Earn interest on your FD and cashback on PIXEL Credit Card spends
    * No income proof required


  * **How to apply?**


  * You can apply for the FD-backed PIXEL Credit Card exclusively via the HDFC Bank [PayZapp](https://v.hdfcbank.com/payzapp/index.html) app.
  * To know more about FD Backed PIXEL Credit Cards, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/pixel-go-credit-card/pdfs/pixel-fd-backed-cards-faqs-23-feb-2026.pdf)


## Get an assured PIXEL Credit Card by booking  
it against an FD.
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=ZETA&LGCode=MKTG "Apply Now ")
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


## Application Process
**You can easily apply for the PIXEL Play Credit Card by following the steps below:​**
  * Step 1: Download or update the PayZapp app from the Google Play Store for Android or the App Store for iOS 
  * Step 2: Click on the 'Apply Now for PIXEL Play' banner on the PayZapp homepage.


In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.*
Read important notes for more information
[Check Eligibility (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=ZETA&LGCode=MKTG "Check Eligibility")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card Application Process](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

#  Card Control via PayZapp 
  * End to end Management via PayZapp
  * Track spends
  * Track and redeem rewards
  * Raise tickets In-app via help center


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Card Highlights 
  * **Rewards:**  
Enjoy exciting CashBacks on SmartBuy, Amazon, Flipkart, eligible transactions, and more. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card/pixel-play-credit-card-terms-and-conditions.pdf) to read the T&C.
  * **Pay in Parts:**  
**EMI Dashboard :** Manage all your live EMIs within the EMI dashboard from PayZapp.   
**Flexibility :** Choose low-cost and flexible tenures that suit best for your choice of repayment. You can choose between select transactions or outstanding balances*.  
**100% Digital :** No documentation, email, or calling required. Simply convert to EMI and manage EMI repayments fully from your PayZapp.


To know more detailed Terms & conditions [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card/pay-in-parts-terms-and-condition.pdf)
  * **Exclusive Dining Privileges:  
**Enjoy upto 10% off on all your restaurant bill payments via Swiggy Dineout (Swiggy Dineout Logo) (20k + restaurants) (Offer inclusive of Restaurant and Swiggy Discount). Offer valid only on payments done via Swiggy App. To know more, [click here](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in/offer_details/swiggy-dineout/26020/Z2mjlWM%3D)
  * **Fuel Surcharge Waiver:  
**1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India (on a minimum transaction of ₹400 and a maximum transaction of ₹5,000. Maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle). 
  * **Renewal Waiver:  
**Spend ₹1 lakh or more in the preceding 12 months and get renewal membership fee waived off for next year.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  PIXEL CashPoints 
  * CashBack will be credited in the form of PIXEL CashPoints and can be easily managed under the rewards section of the PIXEL Homepage in Payzapp.​
  * Upon the accumulation of 1000 PIXEL CashPoints, they can be redeemed easily to the PayZapp Wallet and used to purchase your choice of brand vouchers within PayZapp digitally. 
  * PIXEL CashPoints are valid for 2 years from the date of accumulation.​


![Fuel Surcharge Waiver](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Statement & Repayments 
  * You can easily view and download the digital statements in the PayZapp. ​
  * View the current outstanding on the card and make card repayment within the PIXEL Home page using payment methods like UPI, Debit Card, & NetBanking.
  * Repayment can also be made via third part apps


![Welcome Renwal Bonus](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Steps to Activate 
  * Download HDFC Bank PayZapp from Google Play or Apple App Store.
  * Sign up using your mobile number (ensure it matches the one used for your PIXEL Card application)
  * After PayZapp registration is completed, click on the " Activate your card" banner present on the PayZapp homepage
  * Click on "Activate & start customizing" to activate your card. Your PIXEL Play Card is instantly activated
  * Customise your card by choosing a vibrant card colour – POP, LIT, or ICE.
  * Choose any two brand packs that fit your lifestyle (Dining & Entertainment, Fashion, Electronics, Travel, Grocery, etc.), and choose any 1 Ecommerce Platform on which you want to earn 3% Cashback (Amazon, PayZapp or Flipkart )
  * Set your card PIN and card control
  * Your PIXEL is now ready for shopping


![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Steps to set UPI PIN 
  * Open PayZapp and tap on "View PIXEL Home" on the home screen
  * Navigate to Settings > "Set RuPay UPI"
  * Verify your OTP, set your card PIN, and you're all set!


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Enable Scan & Pay 
Link Your HDFC Bank PIXEL RuPay Credit Card for Scan & Pay:
  * Open PayZapp and tap the menu bar on the top left corner.
  * Go to "UPI Accounts" under Account Management.
  * Under Credit Cards, tap "Add New" and select HDFC Bank Credit Card.
  * Enter the last 6 digits of your card and its expiry date, then proceed.
  * Verify with OTP, enter your credit card PIN, and create your UPI PIN.
  * Done! Your card is now linked for Scan & Pay transactions.
  * Enable Scan & Pay payments for third party apps


To know more about PIXEL RuPay Credit Card, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card/pixel-rupay-credit-card-faqs1.pdf)
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Enable Scan & Pay for Third-Party Apps 
Enable Scan & Pay on Third-Party Apps in a few steps:
  * Open the app and go to Payment Methods.
  * Select "Add RuPay Credit Card on UPI", choose HDFC Bank, and continue.
  * When the "Add HDFC Bank RuPay Credit Card" prompt appears, tap Continue.
  * Your PIXEL RuPay Credit Card is now linked and ready for Scan & Pay transactions.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Servicing via Help Center 
  * You can easily refer to the FAQs for every section by clicking on “?” in the app screen to view and get answers to your questions. ​
  * You can also raise a query ticket within the app if you need more help by clicking “Raise a Ticket”, and the service team will respond to your query in the app.​
  * **How to Raise a Ticket?**  
1. Tap "?" on the PIXEL Play Credit Card Home Page.  
2. Choose the relevant category and query.  
3. If your query isn’t listed, select "My query is not listed" to raise a ticket.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Contactless Payment 
  * **Swipe to Pay**  
PIXEL Play Credit Card lets you make E- commerce transactions effortlessly with - Swipe to Pay. Now make quick and secure online payments without need of one-time password (OTP) sent via SMS.
  * **Tap & Pay**  
PIXEL Play Credit Card has enabled contactless payments to facilitate fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets. Just tap once with either your phone or physical card and make hassle free offline payments.
  * **Scan and Pay**  
Through the PIXEL RuPay Credit Card, customers will be able to make payment to a merchant by scanning the QR code for unified Payment Interface (UPI) Payments.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Fees & Charges 
  * The HDFC Bank PIXEL Play Credit Card is lifetime free with no joining or renewal fees


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

#  Where to apply for the PIXEL Play Credit Card 
**You can apply for the PIXEL Play Credit Card directly by(opens in a new tab)[clicking here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=ZETA&LGCode=MKTG)**
You can also apply for a PIXEL Play Credit Card via: 
  * [Website](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/)
  * [PayZapp](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/ways-to-bank/mobilebanking/payzapp)
  * [NetBanking(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/)
  * [Branches(opens in a new tab)](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/)


![Ways to Apply](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Important Notes 
Note:
A. Upon approval of your PIXEL Credit Card, please complete the card setup process in PayZapp to ensure timely delivery. This step is compulsory and includes choosing your card design (POP, LIT, or ICE), choosing your offer pack (5% or 3% cashback) choice of brands, and the billing cycle date.
B. In case you do not select the credit card design within 3 days of approval, you'll be issued a digital RuPay card, while the bank will dispatch a default VISA network credit card with the ICE design to your registered postal address as part of the standard issuance process.
​​​​​​​C. Customers applying for PIXEL Credit Card via PayZapp will get the option to choose network(Visa/RuPay/Both). This option will be available up to 3 days from the day of card application approval, post that, you'll be issued with both RuPay & Visa network cards with RuPay as a Digital Card and Visa as a physical plastic card to your registered postal address with ICE colour card design as a standard issuance process. Please note a single consolidated PIXEL statement will be generated for both the cards together every month.
![Ways to Apply](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
How can one apply for the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card?
Here is how you can apply for the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card  

  * Existing PIXEL Play customers can change your card design by following below steps:  
Log into [PayZapp(opens in a new tab)](https://pzlive.onelink.me/LNkI/PjuX) > Visit PIXEL Homepage > Card settings > Personalise > Change app theme > Select FIFA Card


  * Don’t have a PIXEL Play? [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=ZETA&LGCode=MKTG) to apply now.


_[T&C Apply.(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/fifa-pixel-credit-card/pdf/terms-and-conditions-for-hdfc-bank-pixel-play-fifa-world-cup-visa-credit-card.pdf)_
### 
Who can apply for the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card?
Both existing FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card customers and new customers on approval of a FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card, can apply for the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card.
### 
How can existing PIXEL Play Visa cardholders change their card design to the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card?
Existing customers can change or personalize their card design through the PIXEL app using the below steps:
  * Log in to the PIXEL app (PayZapp)
  * Go to PIXEL Home Page
  * Tap the Settings icon
  * Open the Personalize section >> Change App Theme
  * In Select your App theme, select the FIFA Card
  * Place an order for a physical card
  * Choose the delivery address
  * Tap "Deliver Here" to confirm


### 
Is there a fee for existing customers to switch to the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card?
Yes. Existing PIXEL Play cardholders will be charged ₹100 + GST for the FIFA theme change.
### 
Can new HDFC Bank PIXEL Play customers choose the FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card while applying for a card?
New customers who have been approved for a FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card can select the FIFA card design during the DIY (Do It Yourself) card theme selection process post card issuance.
### 
Can PIXEL Go customers or PIXEL Play RuPay cardholders apply for the FIFA theme?
No. This offer is only applicable for HDFC Bank PIXEL Play Visa Cardholders.
### 
What happens to my HDFC Bank PIXEL Play RuPay card if I switch my HDFC Bank PIXEL Play Visa card to the FIFA design?
If you apply for the new FIFA card design for your HDFC Bank PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card, your HDFC Bank PIXEL Play RuPay credit card will automatically switch to the Ice Theme.
### 
Will my card details change if I switch to the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card design?
Yes. Opting for the new FIFA World Cup 2026™ PIXEL Play Visa Credit Card will re-issue new Credit Card Number.
###  What CashBack benefits does the PIXEL Play Credit Card offer?
PIXEL Play Credit Card offers 5% Cashback on selected brand, and 3% Cashback on choice of Ecommerce Platform. Customers are also eligible for 1% CashBack on all transactions, 5% on SmartBuy purchases, and 1% on UPI spends (for the RuPay variant).
###  Can I convert purchases into EMIs?
Yes, you can instantly convert transactions into EMIs via PayZapp, choosing from flexible tenure options.
###  Which modes of contactless payments are available for PIXEL Play customers ?
Customers can Tap & Pay at stores, Swipe to Pay online, or Scan & Pay via UPI (for the RuPay variant). Mobile Tap & Pay is also available for PIXEL VISA cardholders, who hold NFC enabled Android mobile phones
